description: FreeCAD is open with a T8 Housing Bracket loaded. Design a rectangular mold cavity block for this part by creating a mold stock box that fully encloses the bracket with at least a 10mm margin on all sides (X, Y, and Z). The box must be centered relative to the bracket. Subtract the bracket from the box using a boolean operation to create the cavity. Set the resulting mold object's transparency to 50% and save the file to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/mold_cavity.FCStd.
